title: Stealth Mode / Ambush Mechanic
description: Introduce a new game mechanic where balls can enter a 'stealth' mode using terrain or specific skills. While in stealth, they are invisible to the perception logic of other balls unless those balls have a high 'perception_radius' or specific anti-stealth traits. This encourages ambush behaviors where a ball waits for enemies to get close before striking, significantly expanding strategic depth.
